Function: _fgetpos
Address: 0x4550B0


/* Library Function - Single Match
    _fgetpos
   
   Library: Visual Studio 1998 Release */

int __cdecl _fgetpos(FILE *_File,fpos_t *_Pos)

{
  longlong lVar1;
  
  lVar1 = __ftelli64(_File);
  *_Pos = lVar1;
  if (((int)((ulonglong)lVar1 >> 0x20) == -1) && ((int)*_Pos == -1)) {
    return -1;
  }
  return 0;
}
